title: Phase 21 — Next Daily Priority Queue

priority_queue.action: Check whether any first content click occurred
priority_queue.details: Pull fresh GSC 7d + 28d page dimension. Check for clicks on any page EXCEPT homepage. Update first-click files.
NO — do not re-request. Day 0 is today (Jun 12). Next monitoring window is Day 3 (Jun 15). Just document current status.

For each of the 8 indexed-invisible pages: check if content is adequate. Add FAQ section where missing. Add internal links from pages with impressions. Improve meta description. Pages: mortgage-calculator, loan-calculator, 6 decision pages, retirement-withdrawal.

priority_queue.action: Add 15–30 internal links to real parent pages

priority_queue.details: From the 43 pages with impressions, identify thin/near-duplicate pages. Classify: KEEP / CANONICALIZE / SOFTEN. Do NOT execute canonical/noindex.
Review outreach-v2-followup-jun13-plan.json. Update templates. Do NOT send before Jun 13.
No sitemap removal, no noindex, no canonical, no redirect, no delete. Cleanup test remains BLOCKED_PENDING_DATA_PIPELINE_AND_TEMPLATE_FIX.

do_not_execute: Index indexing requests for same 7 URLs
Optimize thin tools/scenarios as standalone SEO targets
Count branded homepage click as content success
deploy_decision: Deploy only if priority 3 or 4 produces code changes.
